## Change

## Evidence

<!-- List exact commands and results. Attach only redistributable fixtures. -->

- [ ] Shared C++ tests pass, or not affected.
- [ ] Android lint/unit/assemble pass, or not affected.
- [ ] iOS simulator build/tests pass, or not affected.
- [ ] Documentation matches behavior.
- [ ] No secrets, signing material, private media, or unlicensed model weights added.
- [ ] New dependencies/models include provenance, license, checksum, and notices.
